Identity.Name: StingPipeServices
Identity.Definition: Pipe service codes — the canonical name for the fluid / gas a pipe carries. Drives MepAutoSizePipeCommand sizing rules, velocity limits, friction limits, material compatibility (water + copper, gas + black steel, refrigerant + brazed copper / pre-charged liquid line). One code per service so balancing engine and sizing rule registry stay aligned across hosts.

Governance.StandardsBasis: BS EN 806 (water); CIBSE Guide G (plumbing); CIBSE Guide B1 (heating); BS 1710 (pipe identification); ASME B31 (process piping)

Value.Definition: Chilled Water — primary cooling distribution. Typical 6/12 °C flow/return.
Chilled Water Return.
Heating Hot Water Supply (LPHW). Typical 80/60 °C flow/return.
Heating Hot Water Return (LPHW).
Low-temperature Hot Water — heat pump / underfloor primary. Typical 45/35 °C.
Medium-Temperature Hot Water — 95/70 °C flow/return.
High-Temperature Hot Water — 120/80 °C; pressurised circuits.
Domestic Cold Water — potable cold supply per BS EN 806.
Domestic Hot Water flow.
Domestic Hot Water Return — anti-Legionella recirculation per HTM 04-01.
Condensate drain from cooling coils / AHUs / steam.
Refrigerant Gas line (suction side of compressor).
Refrigerant Liquid line (condenser → expansion device).
Steam — saturated or superheated, per ASME B31.1 / BS EN 13480.
Steam Condensate return.
Natural Gas distribution per IGEM/UP/2.
Liquefied Petroleum Gas distribution.
Fuel oil supply to boilers / generators.
Compressed Air (process / instrument), not medical. Use StingMGSGasTypes for medical air.
Process Water — RO, deionised, lab-grade water.
Soil pipe — toilet / WC discharge.
Waste pipe — lavatory / sink / shower discharge.
Vent pipe — soil/waste stack ventilation per BS EN 12056.
Rainwater drainage — gravity or syphonic per BS EN 12056-3.
